undefinedClasses.reason: Dynamic prefix passed to shared createGridLayout(cssPrefix) in dashboard-tab.ts — final classes (fusion-goals-chart-grid, -grid-cell, etc.) are injected at runtime by shared/grid-layout/styles.ts buildGridStyles(). The scanner's runtime builder picks up the literal '${prefix}grid' template but doesn't follow the chart- sub-prefix.
Lifecycle state marker added by registerMarkdownCodeBlockProcessor in main.ts to deduplicate metric code-block initialization (same pattern as periodic-planner-*-initialized). Never styled.
